title: Coronavirus Conspiracy
overview: When a retired Zookeeper is kidnapped by a crazed Economist during the COVID-19 lockdown, he uncovers a grand mystery that connects every worldwide disaster. Together, the Zookeeper and the Economist work to discover who is truly at fault.
